abilities.name: run-away
abilities.description: Ensures success fleeing from wild battles.

abilities.name: pickup
abilities.description: Picks up other Pokémon's used and Flung held items. May also pick up an item after battle.

abilities.name: volt-absorb
abilities.description: Absorbs electric moves, healing for 1/4 max HP.

effectChanges.description: Does not absorb non-damaging electric moves, i.e. thunder wave.
